hypothesis: Augmenting the ∆-learning XGBoost model with GFN1-xTB-derived local electronic descriptors (per-site Mulliken/Loewdin charges and spin densities, metal-centered d-orbital population metrics, and local coordination/ligand-field proxies) will reduce the HSE06 band gap prediction MAE for MOFs containing 3d transition metals (Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni) by at least 30% relative to the current ∆-learning model that uses only structural, stoichiometric and radial/graph descriptors.
